# React TypeScript Project Setup

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Creating React + TypeScript project using Vite

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Creating project manually due to Node version constraints

- [x] Customize the Project - Basic React + TypeScript structure created

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed for this project

- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies installed successfully

- [x] Create and Run Task - Dev server running at http://localhost:5173/

- [x] Launch the Project - Project is already running in dev mode

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md created with project information
